teiny.title: Daily checklist grill reminder loop
teiny.desc: Ask Luisan at least once daily: did we turn today's mistakes/frustrations/lessons into a checklist entry? If not, pause and capture it.

teiny.title: Publish task board as phone-friendly web app (password protected)
teiny.desc: Keep it simple: deploy public URL + auth gate (or no-password first pass if approved). Convex + web-first migration spec: projects/kanban/CONVEX_WEB_MIGRATION_PLAN.md

teiny.title: Add task aging badge + stale-task escalation loop
teiny.desc: Show red badge with days since last touched on each task card. If >21 days, show warning and proactively bring it up in conversation so we decide: restart+reassign, do today, or scrap.

teiny.title: iOS app install workflow + Task Board wrapper app
teiny.desc: Design a permission-based flow to install iOS apps for approved users (primarily Luisan). Explore simple React Native shell with WebView for Task Board so it feels native without using browser directly. Planning/spec only for now.

teiny.title: Feasibility: AI grocery ordering + WhatsApp vendor auto-replies
teiny.desc: Explore two flows: (a) voice-note grocery capture during week -> weekend order automation; (b) reply handling for WhatsApp vendor chats (e.g., Walmart) based on saved preferences and approval boundaries. Discovery/spec only for now.

teiny.title: Quick throwaway checklists feature
teiny.desc: Add a lightweight way to create temporary/throwaway checklists fast without cluttering main checklist library. Planning only for now.

teiny.title: Chargeback states PR
teiny.desc: Update won/lost states + save to database

recurrente.title: AI Withdrawal Reviewer rules
recurrente.desc: add a rule to the ai withdrawal reviewer that checks if there are payments back and forth (a paid b, b paid a)

recurrente.title: Find unnotified chargebacks to fight
recurrente.desc: Identify chargebacks we were not notified of but should contest

recurrente.title: Reject Q67,000 swaps + verify Nexa Bank deduction
recurrente.desc: Reject swaps totaling Q67,000 and check with Nexa Bank if funds were deducted

recurrente.title: Investigar y arreglar retiros aprobados no liquidados
recurrente.desc: Entrarle a investigar y arreglar de raíz los retiros aprobados que no se suben a la liquidación.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Automate profit calculation engine
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Compute per-transaction profit + fixed fees + merchant special pricing overrides from transaction-level charged amounts.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Migrate money fields to NUMERIC + ETH-ready precision
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Move to numeric decimals (no float math), keep precision safe for fiat + future ETH support.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Create balance_adjustments model + DB table
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Manual adjustment class with amount, reason/subreason, note, actor, timestamp, and reference id. Include in monthly revenue bucket as Others.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Implement chargeback dual-date model
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Track both recognition date and cash deduction date to separate accounting reality vs settlement timing reality.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Build chargeback deduction payable reconciliation
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Recognized-not-deducted chargebacks go to payable; clear payable when monthly settlement deduction arrives; auto-match and flag exceptions.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Automate AP report
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Current scope decision: all withdrawable balances + pending withdrawals owed + chargeback_payables

recurrenteAccounting.title: Automate AR report
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Current scope decision: negative balances only (includes merchant debts + unpaid fees for now).

recurrenteAccounting.title: Automate cash flow report (incl. crypto rails)
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Include swaps (buy/sell stable), stable checkout payments, and US-to-Recurrente balance sell flows.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Automate bridge wallet amount extraction
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Pull bridge wallet amounts from existing sheet/source and include in reporting package.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Monthly close policy implementation
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Decision locked: cutoff at 23:59:59 Guatemala on last day of month. Enforce in reports/snapshots.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Open question: late chargeback entry after month close
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Choose policy: (A) backdate with audit-flag + lock controls, or (B) no backdate and roll forward with adjustment note.

recurrenteAccounting.title: Open question: external chargeback granularity
recurrenteAccounting.desc: Current decision: keep external simple as net receivable + recoveries. Revisit if statements require reason-level categories.

puentesat.title: Figure out special taxes (gas, tourism)
puentesat.desc:
Edge cases for parser.

**Important:** satTaxKey format differs between XLS and XML. When adding new tax types, check how taxes are structured in XLS — different format than XML. Must handle both.

puentesat.title: Fix PDF attachment polling architecture
puentesat.desc:
After submission, we poll to check if PDFs are uploading. Current approach keeps spamming attachment requests to check status. Need a better solution (websockets? webhooks? smarter polling?).

**Context:** Shipped as-is to unblock, but it's annoying and inefficient.

puentesat.title: Detect void invoices
puentesat.desc:
Currently not detecting void invoices — uploading as regular.

Should:
- Detect void status
- Show in red
- Block from upload by default
- Option to remove OR force upload with $0 amounts (some want the PDF attached)

puentesat.title: Change organization name from settings
puentesat.desc: Let users change their organization name from the settings page.

tributax.title: Fix payment link (after refactor)
tributax.desc:
Payment link fix didn't work. Fix once refactor is done.

**Context:** Shipped fix Feb 6, verified Feb 8 — not working. Manual charge needed in meantime.

tributax.title: Fix duplicate subscription bug (Migo)
tributax.desc: When payment fails and we create new link, old inactive sub can reactivate → double charges. See projects/tributax/PAYMENTS.md for full context.

tributax.title: Wrong address on Invoice
tributax.desc:
Factura ID: 64801
Elige establecimiento 1, pero le aparece la direccion del establecimiento 2 en la factura.
